title: Proxima Flow workflow config
description: Drop this file at .claude/workflow-config.json in your repo to override plugin defaults.

tracker.description: Which ticket tracker to use. Default: ado.

ado.description: Azure DevOps connection details. Falls back to `az devops configure` defaults.

github.description: GitHub connection details. Required when tracker is 'github'.

owner.description: GitHub org or user owning the repo, e.g. epinova

template.description: Path to a custom triage template (relative to repo root). Defaults to the plugin's built-in triage-template.md.

estimationScale.description: Fibonacci-style effort scale. Must be an ordered array of non-negative integers.

defaultTags.description: Tags always prepended to the generated tag list (e.g. your team name).

estimationScale.description: Effort scale used when re-estimating. Defaults to the triage scale.

gitLookbackDays.description: How many days of git history to consider. Default: 7.

autoTransitionState.description: If true, offer to transition the work item state after posting the update. Default: false.

targetBranch.description: Branch to target for the PR. Default: main.

template.description: Path to a custom PR description template (relative to repo root).

draft.description: Open PR as a draft. Default: false.

defaultReviewers.description: ADO user emails or IDs to add as reviewers automatically.

defaultType.description: Work item type to create when not specified. Default: Task.

defaultState.description: State to set on the created item. Default: Done.

defaultTags.description: Tags always applied to tracked items (e.g. 'unplanned', 'tech-debt').

areaPath.description: ADO area path for the created item (e.g. YourProject\TeamArea).

iterationPath.description: ADO iteration path for the created item (e.g. YourProject\Sprint 42).
